name: california-riverside
description: Riverside County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Riverside County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Riverside County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Riverside County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Riverside County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Riverside County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-riverside-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-riverside-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The list of representatives is not directly visible in the provided HTML snippet; it is located inside the nested menu structure under the 'Board of Supervisors' > 'Board Members' link.

The 'Board Members' link has the selector: '.main-menu-wrapper .coh-menu-list-container .menu-level-1 .coh-menu-list-item .menu-level-2-wrapper .menu-level-2 .coh-menu-list-item a[href="/board-supervisors"]'.
The actual representative data (names, photos, districts) is likely loaded dynamically via JavaScript after clicking the 'Board Members' link, as the current HTML only shows the navigation menu.
The site uses a Drupal-based structure with classes like 'coh-menu-list-item' and 'coh-link' for navigation elements.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Riverside County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Riverside County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Riverside County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Riverside County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
